summary: Frontend visual testing for coral (#D85A30) standardization across product pages. Key finding: several updated files (ProductsPage, DQFilePacketPage, StarterStackPage, SafetyAuditPrepPage, BundlePage) are NOT routed in App.js and return 404. Only BundleSalesPage (/bundle) and packet pages using ProductPageTemplate are reachable and showing coral correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: DQFilePacketPage.jsx, StarterStackPage.jsx, SafetyAuditPrepPage.jsx have coral updates but no routes in App.js — all referenced product URLs (/products/dq-file-builder, /products/drug-alcohol-compliance, /products/starter-stack, /products/safety-audit-prep) return 404
BundlePage.jsx (products/BundlePage.jsx) is imported in App.js but has NO Route pointing to it — it is unreachable. The /products/bundle URL 404s.

ProductsPage.jsx has coral updates but /products redirects to ComplianceLibraryPage.jsx which still uses gold (#d4900a) only — no coral applied. The actual catalog page users see has NOT been updated.

issues: Hero label 'LP-SYS-LIBRARY | OPERATING STANDARDS LIBRARY' appears gold, not coral
Header bottom-border appears gold, not coral
Section labels appear gold, not coral — ComplianceLibraryPage.jsx was not updated

pages_tested./bundle (BundleSalesPage): PASS — Coral label LP-BDL-001, coral 2px bar under H1, coral header border, NO pulsing dot — static square indicator present
pages_tested./products/new-entrant-packet (NewEntrant: PASS — Coral label, coral H1 bar, coral header border, coral 'WHAT THIS IS' left-border section
pages_tested./products/drug-alcohol-packet (DrugAlcoh: PASS — Coral label, coral H1 bar, coral header border, coral section labels
pages_tested./compliance-library (ComplianceLibraryPa: FAIL — Uses gold not coral, page was not updated

action_items: Add routes in App.js for: /products/dq-file-builder → DQFilePacketPage, /products/starter-stack → StarterStackPage, /products/safety-audit-prep → SafetyAuditPrepPage
Add Route for BundlePage at /products/bundle (or clarify if BundlePage is meant to be the /bundle route instead of BundleSalesPage)

Either: (1) update ComplianceLibraryPage.jsx with coral colors to match the standard, OR (2) change the /products redirect to point to ProductsPage instead of ComplianceLibraryPage — currently the updated ProductsPage.jsx is unreachable
Verify the URL slugs — review request used /products/drug-alcohol-compliance but App.js has /products/drug-alcohol-packet — confirm intended URLs
critical_code_review_comments: App.js imports BundlePage but never uses it in any Route — dead import
ProductsPage.jsx updated with coral but has no route — code is unreachable
5 updated product pages (DQFilePacketPage, StarterStackPage, SafetyAuditPrepPage, BundlePage, ProductsPage) have NO routes in App.js
ComplianceLibraryPage.jsx at /compliance-library (the actual product catalog page) was NOT updated to use coral

success_rate.frontend: 30% — Only 3 of 10 pages tested have coral (bundle, new-entrant-packet, drug-alcohol-packet via template); 5 pages 404; 1 page (compliance-library) still uses gold

context_for_next_testing_agent: Coral color changes are implemented in component files but most pages are unreachable (no routes). The working pages using ProductPageTemplate (new-entrant-packet, drug-alcohol-packet) correctly show coral. BundleSalesPage (/bundle) correctly shows coral with no pulsing dot. Main agent needs to add routes for the new pages and fix ComplianceLibraryPage.
